listings.name: ClarityLift
listings.description: Organizational health intelligence from communication signals. No surveys, no surveillance.
listings.rationale: First-party Startvest product. Listed at v1 launch under disclosure-asterisk per Veto 2 of the directory's INTEGRITY.md. Methodology page at /methodology carries Version + Changelog headings; integrity statement at /integrity maps all six Layer 1 vetoes.
